is_authority_for: United States (CONUS, Alaska, Hawaii, US territories)
USGS.notes: Authoritative aggregator for global Mw. Global feed is NOT complete; misses many M4.5-5.5 caught by local networks.

EMSC.coverage: Europe and Mediterranean primary; global secondary
EMSC.notes: Best aggregator for European events. Maintains an event-id mapping service that cross-references USGS and other agency IDs.

JMA.notes: Authoritative for Japan. Detects events globals miss. Magnitudes generally lower than USGS Mw for the same event due to different methodology.

INGV.full_name: Istituto Nazionale di Geofisica e Vulcanologia
INGV.notes: Authoritative for Italy and adjacent Mediterranean. Reports Ml primarily.

AFAD.notes: Authoritative for Türkiye. Custom JSON API, not FDSN.

IGEPN.full_name: Instituto Geofísico de la Escuela Politécnica Nacional (Ecuador)

CENC.notes: Authoritative for China. Limited public API; magnitudes typically Ms.

IMO.notes: Authoritative for Iceland. Custom JSON API.

GFZ.notes: German global aggregator. Useful as a secondary global cross-check.

IRIS.notes: Federated event service; defaults to USGS PDE for recent, ISC for older.

ISC.notes: Authoritative REVIEWED bulletin, but lags by ~24 months. Use only for research-grade historical queries.

SED.notes: Authoritative for Switzerland. Reports Ml primarily; reviewed Mw for larger events.

IPGP.full_name: Institut de Physique du Globe de Paris
IPGP.coverage: French overseas territories (Caribbean, Réunion, Mayotte) and global volcano observatories
IPGP.notes: Operates volcano observatories. Authoritative for French overseas regions outside RESIF's mainland coverage.

NCEDC.full_name: Northern California Earthquake Data Center (UC Berkeley)
NCEDC.notes: Authoritative for events north of ~35°N in California. Co-authoritative with USGS via ANSS.

SCEDC.notes: Authoritative for events south of ~37°N in California. Header has a 'Longtitude' typo handled by the parser.

BMKG.notes: Authoritative for Indonesia. FDSN endpoint available; magnitudes typically Mb or Mw.

NIEP.notes: Authoritative for Romania. Key for intermediate-depth Vrancea events.

RESIF.full_name: Réseau Sismologique et Géodésique Français (RESIF / EPOS-France)
RESIF.notes: Authoritative for mainland France. Overseas departments (IPGP / Caribbean / Réunion) are reported by IPGP.

KNMI.full_name: Koninklijk Nederlands Meteorologisch Instituut (Royal Netherlands Meteorological Institute)
KNMI.coverage: Netherlands, Belgium, and Dutch Caribbean (Leeward Islands)
KNMI.notes: Monitors induced seismicity in Groningen (gas field) as well as tectonic events. Reports MLs (local) and MLbes (Leeward Islands) magnitudes.

NRCAN.coverage: Canada and adjacent regions (Alaska, Yukon, Cascadia, Arctic)
NRCAN.notes: Authoritative for Canada. Flags suspected industry-induced events distinctly (MLy magnitude type). Bilingual region names (EN/FR).
